title: Sword Art Online Fade
description:
English:
Add the fade effect and sound from Sword Art Online and Add the anime music.

Español
Añade el efecto y sonido de desvanecimiento del anime Sword Art Online y añade música del anime.
body:
English:
Change the fading effect of Minecraft mobs when they die and the sound, also that of the items when they are destroyed and replace the disc with some sountracks from Sword Art Online

Changelog by folder:
====================================Records===================================
5            default
11            default
13            default
blocks            Sword Art Online Opening 1 full    
cat            Dance with me
chirp            Sword Art Online Opening 2 full
creator            Think Tenderly of You
creator_music_box    Think Tenderly of You Mbox Version
far            You Are not Alone
lava_chicken        Sword Art Online Unleash Blading Opening full
mall            Sword Art Online Ending 2 Full
mellohi            Sword Art Online II Opening 2 full
otherside        Sword Art Online Alicization Opening 1 full
pigstep            Luminous Sword
precipice        Moon And Shadow
relic            Run, Run, Runaway
stal            Sword Art Online II Ending 3 full
strad            Light Your Sword
tears            Sword Art Online Aria of a starless night
wait            Break Beat Bark!
Ward            Longing

=====================================Music======================================
______________________________________Game______________________________________
a_familiar_room        A Well-Earned Celebration (Frieren)
an_ordinary_day        The Frist Town
ancestry        Quiet Strain

clark            One Last Adventure (Frieren)

watcher            Confront Battle
wending            A Sad Quarrel
wet_hands        If we were together, we could...
yakusoku        Walikng around together
____________________________________Creative____________________________________

_______________________________________End______________________________________
Alpha            default
boss            default
the_end            default

ballad_of_the_cats    Past Sadness
concrete_halls        He rules us - Progressive mix
dead_voxel        Death Game - Progressive mix
warmth            Like in the Glass
---------------------------------Crimson Forest---------------------------------
chrysopoeia        Death Gun
---------------------------------Nether Wastes----------------------------------

mutation        default

Español:
Cambia el efecto de desvanecimiento de los mobs de minecraft al morir y el sonido, tambien el de los items al ser destruidos y reemplaza las canciones de discos y fondo con algunos soundtracks de Sword Art Online

Lista de Cambios por carpeta:
====================================Records===================================
5            default
11            default
13            default
blocks            Sword Art Online Opening 1 full    
cat            Dance with me
chirp            Sword Art Online Opening 2 full
creator            Think Tenderly of You

stal            Sword Art Online II Ending 3 full
strad            Light Your Sword
tears            Sword Art Online Aria of a starless night
wait            Break Beat Bark!
Ward            Longing
